title: Data Analysis & Engineering
description: Building end-to-end data pipelines using Python and SQL. Experienced in data preparation, cleaning, feature engineering, and transforming raw datasets into reliable, high-quality inputs for analytics and machine learning.

title: Machine Learning & AI
description: Designing and deploying ML models across the full lifecycle — from data preparation and model training to inference, debugging, and evaluation. Skilled in Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and predictive modeling.

title: Business Intelligence & Visualization
description: Developing interactive Power BI and Tableau dashboards that translate complex data into clear stakeholder-ready insights. Experienced in DAX, M Language, KPI tracking, and automated reporting.

title: AI Evaluation & Quality Assurance
description: Assessing the accuracy, reasoning, and quality of AI-generated outputs against established guidelines. Skilled in side-by-side model evaluations, fact-checking, and delivering structured, well-justified assessments.
